languages.text: "Вольный Торговец, во имя Бога-Машины, будьте осторожнее!" {n}Скривившись от боли и напряжения, Эоганн пытается дотянуться одним из манипуляторов до многочисленных тумблеров агрегата.{/n} "Ток гальванических энергий в контуре трона преисполнен мощи и оттого буйствует. Если вы вмешаетесь, течение эксперимента станет непредсказуемым!"

"By the Machine God, be careful, Rogue Trader!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"
languages.original_text: "Вольный Торговец, во имя Бога-Машины, будьте осторожнее!" {n}Скривившись от боли и напряжения, Эоганн пытается дотянуться одним из манипуляторов до многочисленных тумблеров агрегата.{/n} "Ток гальванических энергий в контуре трона преисполнен мощи и оттого буйствует. Если вы вмешаетесь, течение эксперимента станет непредсказуемым!"

traits.locale_text: "By the Machine God, be careful, Rogue Trader!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"

"Rogue Trader, be careful!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"

"Rogue Trader, be careful!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"

"By the Machine God, be careful, Rogue Trader!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"

languages.text: "Beim Maschinengott, seid vorsichtig, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}!" {n}Mit vor Schmerz und Anstrengung verzerrtem Gesicht versucht Eogunn, mit einem seiner Mechadendriten die zahlreichen Schalter der Apparatur zu erreichen.{/n} "Der Thronschaltkreis ist mit galavanischen Energien überladen, das bringt die Spannung in Aufruhr. Greift Ihr ein, ist der Ausgang des Experiments unvorhersehbar."
languages.original_text: "By the Machine God, be careful, Rogue Trader!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"

traits.locale_text: "Beim Maschinengott, seid vorsichtig, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}!" {n}Mit vor Schmerz und Anstrengung verzerrtem Gesicht versucht Eogunn, mit einem seiner Mechadendriten die zahlreichen Schalter der Apparatur zu erreichen.{/n} "Der Thronschaltkreis ist mit galavanischen Energien überladen, das bringt die Spannung in Aufruhr. Greift Ihr ein, ist der Ausgang des Experiments unvorhersehbar."

languages.text: « Par le Dieu-Machine, prenez garde, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} ! » {n}Le visage tordu par la douleur et l'effort, Eogunn tend avec difficulté l'un de ses manipulateurs vers les nombreux interrupteurs à bascule de l'appareil.{/n} « Le circuit du fauteuil est surchargé d'énergies galvaniques et le courant est très puissant. Si vous intervenez, l'expérience aura des résultats imprévisibles ! »
languages.original_text: "By the Machine God, be careful, Rogue Trader!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"

traits.locale_text: « Par le Dieu-Machine, prenez garde, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande} ! » {n}Le visage tordu par la douleur et l'effort, Eogunn tend avec difficulté l'un de ses manipulateurs vers les nombreux interrupteurs à bascule de l'appareil.{/n} « Le circuit du fauteuil est surchargé d'énergies galvaniques et le courant est très puissant. Si vous intervenez, l'expérience aura des résultats imprévisibles ! »

languages.text: “万机之神在上，请务必小心，行商浪人！”{n}伊奥贡因痛苦与用力而龇牙咧嘴，挣扎着将一根机械触须伸向装置上的众多拨动开关。{/n}“王座电路已因电激能量过载，电流正处于失控状态。如果您介入，实验将走向不可预测的方向！”
languages.original_text: "By the Machine God, be careful, Rogue Trader!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"

traits.locale_text: “万机之神在上，请务必小心，行商浪人！”{n}伊奥贡因痛苦与用力而龇牙咧嘴，挣扎着将一根机械触须伸向装置上的众多拨动开关。{/n}“王座电路已因电激能量过载，电流正处于失控状态。如果您介入，实验将走向不可预测的方向！”

languages.text: «Por el Dios Máquina, ¡cuidado, Comerciante Independiente!» {n}Con una mueca de dolor y esfuerzo, Eogunn extiende uno de sus manipuladores hasta uno de los alternadores del aparato.{/n} «El circuito del trono está sobrecargado con energías galvánicas y la corriente es furiosa. Si interfiere, ¡el resultado del experimento será impredecible!».
languages.original_text: "By the Machine God, be careful, Rogue Trader!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"

traits.locale_text: «Por el Dios Máquina, ¡cuidado, Comerciante Independiente!» {n}Con una mueca de dolor y esfuerzo, Eogunn extiende uno de sus manipuladores hasta uno de los alternadores del aparato.{/n} «El circuito del trono está sobrecargado con energías galvánicas y la corriente es furiosa. Si interfiere, ¡el resultado del experimento será impredecible!».

languages.text: 「機械神にかけて、気をつけたまえ、ローグ・トレーダー！」{n}痛みと労苦に顔をしかめながら、エオガンはマニピュレーターの一本を装置の多数のトグルスイッチへ伸ばそうと苦闘する。{/n}「玉座の回路はガルバニックのエネルギーで過負荷となり、電流が荒れ狂っている。君が干渉すれば、実験の経過は予測不能となるだろう！」
languages.original_text: "By the Machine God, be careful, Rogue Trader!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"

traits.locale_text: 「機械神にかけて、気をつけたまえ、ローグ・トレーダー！」{n}痛みと労苦に顔をしかめながら、エオガンはマニピュレーターの一本を装置の多数のトグルスイッチへ伸ばそうと苦闘する。{/n}「玉座の回路はガルバニックのエネルギーで過負荷となり、電流が荒れ狂っている。君が干渉すれば、実験の経過は予測不能となるだろう！」

languages.text: "Makine Tanrı aşkına, dikkatli olun Hür Tacir!" {n}Acı ve çabayla yüzünü buruşturan Eogunn, manipülatörlerinden birini cihazdaki sayısız geçiş anahtarına uzatmaya çalışıyor.{/n} "Taht devresi galvaniz enerjilerle aşırı yüklendiğinden akım kontrolden çıkıyor. Müdahale ederseniz deneyin seyri tahmin edilemez olur!"
languages.original_text: "By the Machine God, be careful, Rogue Trader!" {n}Grimacing with pain and exertion, Eogunn struggles to extend one of his manipulators to the numerous toggle switches on the apparatus.{/n} "The throne circuit is overloaded with galvanic energies and so the current is rampaging. If you interfere, the course of the experiment will be unpredictable!"
